description_long: This is a military-style SUV with a boxy, utilitarian design, reminiscent of classic World War II jeeps. The vehicle features a matte olive drab exterior with visible white star insignias and U.S. Army markings on the hood and sides. The front has a flat grille with round headlights and a canvas-covered roof, while the rear is loaded with wooden crates and a spare tire mounted on the back. The SUV has simple, rugged wheels and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing function over form. The interior appears basic, likely with metal and canvas seating, and the vehicle is equipped for off-road and utility use. The overall appearance suggests durability and practicality, suitable for both urban and rugged environments.
description: A military-style, olive drab SUV with canvas roof, white star insignias, and rear cargo of wooden crates and a spare tire.
description_view_0: Front and partial side view showing the flat grille, round headlights, canvas roof, and white star insignia on the hood.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the canvas roof, U.S. Army markings, and the rear cargo area filled with wooden crates.
description_view_2: Rear and partial side view displaying the spare tire, stacked crates, and the open cargo area.
description_view_3: Back and angled view emphasizing the rear canvas cover, spare tire, and the utilitarian rear cargo section.
attribute_wheel_design: solid black steel wheels with simple, utilitarian design and no visible spokes
